narrative:
Precinct Benton (precinct in Hocking County) has 496 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
